title: Unbiased integration of single cell transcriptome replicates.
author: Loza M Teraguchi S Standley DM Diez D
content: S-EPMC8923008 PMC8923008 Unbiased integration of single cell transcriptome replicates. Single cell transcriptomic approaches are becoming mainstream, with replicate experiments commonly performed with the same single cell technology.
